LoginIntroDescription: Sign in to discover nearby shops on the map, place orders, or open your own digital storefront.
AboutIntro1: GPS Shops is a global, location-aware marketplace that connects people with the shops, services, and experiences around them — wherever they are in the world.
AboutIntro2: We combine the power of local discovery with the convenience of online shopping, helping businesses create beautiful digital storefronts that customers can find instantly through map-based search and global discovery.
OurMissionP1: We believe local commerce should feel as effortless as scrolling a feed.
OurMissionP2: From a single market stall to a growing retail chain, every business deserves the ability to be discovered, browsed, and supported online without needing expensive websites, complex systems, or large marketing budgets.
DiscoverNearbyShopsDesc: Use the interactive map to explore shops, services, and local businesses near your current location.
BrowseAndOrderDesc: View menus, products, and services, build your basket, and place orders quickly from your phone.
OpenYourOwnShopDesc: Create and manage your own digital storefront with a powerful mobile-first dashboard designed for speed and simplicity.
GoGlobalDesc: Upgrade to Pro Mode to unlock Global Shop visibility, custom GPS location settings, reduced adverts, and premium features.
MultiLanguageThemeDesc: Use the platform in your preferred language and theme for a fully personalised experience.
WhyGPSShopsP1: Because the future of shopping is not just online.
WhyGPSShopsP2: It is local, global, mobile, and immediate.
FounderVisionP1: GPS Shops began as an idea to bridge the gap between physical shops and the digital world.
FounderVisionP2: Long before modern AI tools and rapid app builders, the vision was simple:
FounderVisionP3: Make it possible for any business, anywhere, to create a digital shop that customers could discover instantly through location and mobile technology.
FounderVisionP4: This original founder video shares the early concept behind what is now GPS Shops.
FounderVisionP5: While the platform has evolved significantly since then, the mission remains the same:
WatchOriginalConceptVideo: Watch the original concept video below.
GetInTouchP1: Questions, feedback, partnerships, or want to list your shop?
SeoTitle_Home: GPS Shops — Ngasanja o ma eshopu mi nsi nsi ho a oda yenge nkhala nda nkhoma nkhoma

Legal_Intro1: GPS Shops ezali platforme ya zando ya numeri oyo eyebi esika mpe epesi nzika na ba bizine, ba mosali mpe ba kliente kokutana na nzela ya bamasini ya kosomba ya internet, kotala na carte mpe ba serivisi ya kosomba ya nivera.
Legal_Intro2: Na kosalelaka site oyo, app ya telefone, to ba serivisi nyonso oyo GPS Shops esalaka, ozali kondima na tiriki mpe kondo oyo elandi.
Legal_S1_P1: GPS Shops epesaka platforme po na ba bizine ya kopola, ba mosali mpe ba kliente kokutana.
Legal_S1_P2: Ozali te mosali ya koteka ya kopola, mosala ya koteka, mosali-makolo, to mosala ya kokomisa biloko po na biloko mpe ba serivisi oyo ba bizine ya batu mosusu balobi, longola soki elobeli yango malamu.
Legal_S1_P3: Ba transaksi oyo esalemi na nzela ya platforme ezali bomoko ya kosomba mpe ya koteka kati ya mosombi mpe mosali-biloko ya kopola to bizine.
Legal_S2_P1: Ba mosaleli nyonso basalelaka GPS Shops na likama na bango moko.
Legal_S2_P2: Ba mosombi bazali responsable ya koya ya kokosa, ya makolo, ya bofulami, mpe ya kolalana ya mosali, ya biloko, to ya serivisi liboso ya kosomba.
Legal_S2_P3: Ba mosali bazali responsable ya koyeba ete biloko, ba serivisi, ba ngombami, ba description, mpe ba information ya bizine oyo bapesaka ezali ya solo, ya yelo, mpe ya kokitana.
Legal_S2_P4: Ba mosaleli bazali responsable ya koye bisika ya ba akaunti na bango, ba login na bango, mpe ba kredensia ya koye.
Legal_S3_P1: Ba transaksi ya ngombami ekoki kosalema na nzela ya ba mosali ya bato mosusu neti Stripe to ba platforme ya ngombami mosusu.
Legal_S3_P2: GPS Shops ezali responsable te po na:
Legal_S3_B10: ba mpikani ya makolo ya serivisi
Legal_S3_P3: Ba mpikani nyonso oyo etali ba kosomba, ba refunds, ba kokomisa, to makolo ya biloko esengeli kosalema na kopola kati ya mosombi mpe mosali kaka soki elengelami na mobeko.
Legal_S4_P1: Ba abonnement ya Pro Mode mpe ba serivisi ya premium ekoki kopesa ba makambo ya kokoma neti Global Shop ya kokutana, ko-advertising ya kokoma, ba kontrole ya shop ya kokoma, mpe ba outils ya premium.
Legal_S4_P2: Ba ngombami ya abonnement ezali ya koye te longola soki elengelami na mobeko to elobeli yango malamu.
Legal_S4_P3: Ba mosaleli bazali responsable ya kokotisa ba annulation na nzela ya mosali ya ngombami to platforme ya app store.
Legal_S4_P4: Kokanisa te ba abonnement oyo ezali kosalema na mosala ekoki kopesa nzika ya kokotisa ba ngombami na makambo ya abonnement.
Legal_S5_P1: Atako tolingi kopesa serivisi ya kolalana, GPS Shops esalaka te te nzika ya kokoma, ya kolalana ya kopola, to ya kosala na te na mpikani.
Legal_S5_B8: ba interruptions ya serivisi oyo esalemaki na ba mosali ya bato mosusu
Legal_S5_P3: Ba mosaleli basengeli kaka koyeba ba backups na bango ya ba data ya bizine ya kokitana soki ezali malamu.
Legal_S6_P1: Na limiti ya likolo oyo mobeko epesi nzika, GPS Shops, ba mosali na yango, ba mosali ya bizine, ba mosali na yango, mpe ba partenaires na yango bakozala te responsable po na:
Legal_S6_B1: kobebisa ya mosolo ya kopambala to ya kokoma
Legal_S6_B6: ba mpikani ya mobeko kati ya ba mosaleli
Legal_S6_B9: kobebisa ya securite oyo esalemaki na ba serivisi ya bato mosusu
Legal_S6_B10: ba ndenge nyonso ya kobebisa ya kokoma to ya kopambala oyo euti na kosalela ya platforme
Legal_S6_P2: Kosalela ya platforme ezali na likama na yo moko.
Legal_S7_P1: Ba mosaleli basengeli te kosalela GPS Shops po na:
Legal_S7_B1: biloko to ba serivisi ya mabe
Legal_S7_B6: kosala ya mabe to ya likama
Legal_S7_P2: Tozalaka na likolo ya kokangisa to kokangisa ba akaunti te soki likama lizali ya kosalela ya mabe.
Legal_S8_P1: Ba branding nyonso, ba logo, design ya platforme, software, structure ya biloko, mpe ba biloko ya ebandeli oyo etali GPS Shops ezali kaka propriete ya intellectuel ya GPS Shops longola soki elobeli yango malamu.
Legal_S8_P2: Ba mosaleli bakoki te kokopa, kobebisa, koteka lisusu, to kosalela biloko ya platforme te soki te na nzela ya mokanda.
Legal_S9_P1: Kosalela ya platforme ezali mpe na nzela ya Politiki na biso ya Confidentialite.
Legal_S9_P2: Na kosalela GPS Shops, ba mosaleli bazali kondima na collection mpe processing ya data ya kokitana po na kosala platforme, na kati ya ba details ya akaunti, ba serivisi ya esika, mpe ba information ya transaction soki ezali malamu.
Legal_S10_Title: 10. Ba Ndembo na Ba Tiriki Oyo
Legal_S10_P1: Tozalaka na likolo ya kokoma ba tiriki oyo na nkombo nyonso.
Legal_S10_P2: Kosala kaka ya platforme na nsima ya ba ndembo oyo ekosalema na ba tiriki ya kokoma.
Legal_S10_P3: Ba mosaleli basengeli kaka kotala page oyo na mikolo mosusu.
Legal_S11_P1: Po na ba mpikani ya mobeko, ba mpikani ya platforme, to ba support ya kozala, soki olanga: support@gpshops.com
Legal_Footer: Na kosalela kaka GPS Shops, ozali kondima ete oyebi mpe oyambi Ba Tiriki oyo, Eko, mpe Limites ya Liabilite.
